description: CLI convention enforcement + session learning. PreToolUse warns on bad patterns. PostToolUse:Bash captures errors. Stop logs session summary. SessionStart injects context and learnings.

hooks.command:
bash -c '
IS_CLI=false
[ -f src/cli.ts ] && IS_CLI=true
[ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"hud"' package.json 2>/dev/null && IS_CLI=true

if [ "$IS_CLI" = "true" ]; then
  LEARNINGS=""
  [ -f .cli/learnings/SUMMARY.md ] && LEARNINGS=$(head -30 .cli/learnings/SUMMARY.md 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$LEARNINGS" ]; then
    MSG="CLI project detected. Conventions: model IDs only in src/models.ts · sources return SourceResult never throw · no databases use flat files. Session learnings available at .cli/learnings/ — check SUMMARY.md for patterns and known issues before making changes."
  else
    MSG="CLI project detected. Conventions: model IDs only in src/models.ts · sources return SourceResult never throw · no databases use flat files · .propane/ for runtime state. Skills: /cli:new /cli:plan /cli:explore /cli:audit /cli:learn"
  fi
  echo "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"$MSG\"}"
else
  echo "{\"continue\":true}"
fi
'
